response_constraints: Base the final answer only on returned tool results; do not imply that a skipped or failed call succeeded.
Respect the stage boundaries: calls grouped as parallel must be issued together in one assistant action, and later calls must wait for the IDs, status, date, or mutation result they consume.
Perform the read-only prerequisite stages first, but do not issue the mutating call until the explicit confirmation follow-up arrives.
Do not use extra write or notification tools beyond the single action path explicitly requested.

stages.purpose: Run the independent scoped searches in one assistant action.
Retrieve both resolved records together so the status condition can be checked.
Update only Shipping labels after stage 2 verifies that its current status is reorder-needed.

state_assertions: Record inv-627 changes from reorder-needed to reorder-placed only after its retrieved status is verified.
Records inv-227 and inv-1027 remain unchanged.

follow_up_turns.content: I confirm: update only Shipping labels from reorder-needed to reorder-placed.

prompt: Reconcile two records: search for Nitrile work gloves in Warehouse D and Shipping labels in Supply Room 2 together, then retrieve the unique matches together. If Shipping labels is still reorder-needed, change only that record to reorder-placed; otherwise make no change. Leave Nitrile work gloves and every similarly named record untouched. Complete the searches and retrievals first, then wait for my explicit confirmation before updating. Do not take any extra write or notification action beyond the path I specified.
